package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerGarbageCollectionCleanupFinalizerUsedForRegularCleanup() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_finalizer_used_for_regular_cleanup"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag runtime.SetFinalizer use for ordinary resource cleanup instead of explicit Close ownership."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
